Data Processing Addendum and Privacy Notice between Siam Tamarind Holdings Public Company Limited (SET code: STHX) as Controller and Pinnara Legal & Finance Co., Ltd. as Processor for financing, employment, and cross-border matters.
Processing under PDPA B.E. 2562 is limited to documented instructions for SEC/SET submissions, transactions, HR administration, and compliance audits.
Personal data categories include names (e.g., Khun Somchai Meesuk), role and employee code (e.g., EMP-4472), work contact details, payroll bank alias, and identification document references collected for statutory filings.
Lawful bases: contract performance, legal obligation under the Securities and Exchange Act and SET disclosure rules, legitimate interests with balancing test; consent is used only where required and can be withdrawn.
Processor must identify, segregate, and restrict “inside information” and “non-public information”; materiality is assessed relative to STHX and its listed securities, not to counterparties.
Blackout window: from quarter-end until 24 hours after financial results are disseminated via SETLink, directors and executives may not trade; Processor enforces least-privilege access and insider lists.
Selective disclosure is prohibited; any sharing of material non-public information with analysts, lenders, or advisors requires NDA and simultaneous or prior public dissemination through SETNews/SETLink.
For clarity, STHX’s Form 56-1 One Report for FY2567 filed via SETLink on 15 March 2026 and the 10 April 2026 press release on SETNews regarding a THB 800 million revolving facility are already public and not MNPI.
Vendor updates such as Green Mango Metals Co.’s warehouse opening overseas are non-issuer operational updates and, unless they alter STHX contracts, are not material to STHX.
Cross-border transfers to sub-processor Viriya Cloud Pte. Ltd. (Singapore) for data-room hosting will comply with PDPA Section 28 through contractual safeguards and transfer impact assessment.
Retention: recruitment records 1 year; employee files 10 years post-termination; deal documentation and insider lists at least 5 years after the relevant disclosure on SET; secure deletion with audit logs.
Data subject rights: access, rectification, erasure, portability, and objection may be exercised via privacy@siamtamarind.co.th or to DPO Ms. Lalita Phasuk at dpo@siamtamarind.co.th; identity verification is required.
Security and breach: encryption at rest/in transit, role-based access, and breach notification to STHX and, where applicable, PDPC without undue delay and where feasible within 72 hours.
Disclosure timing: STHX will disclose material information via SETLink without delay and, where practicable, before market open; scheduling requests go to corpsec@siamtamarind.co.th.
For MNPI controls and insider list updates, contact Mr. Preecha Kittinarong at mnpi.gate@pinnara.co.th; communications must use project codes (e.g., TAMR-2026-Q2) rather than descriptive deal names.
This notice does not expand public information: archival content on the corporate website older than two years is considered stale publicity and should not be relied upon for current disclosure decisions.
